titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 865
GA 865
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: lacorom changed to lac at 5.43, 44, 45, 46 and 47 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 7.31 by Rachel Kevern.
Commentary text that had been treated as biblical text removed at 4.45 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Correction changed from * ινα οταν C ιν οταν to * ινα ταν C ιν οταν at 14.29 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 12.1 by David Parker.
Word break in 11.38 corrected by David Parker.
Word breaks in 5.26 and 7.29 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 308650Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 1rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: E.P.Transcription begun: 17 April 2011Transcription finished: 28 April 2011 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - No Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No, this part is omitted. Other remarks: Inkblot obscures uncertain letters on f. 1r and 63v. Verse 5.24 precedents verses 5.22-23. Folio 50r was not available online A corrector (p.m?) underlines words that are to be deleted.FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: The enlarged ε is probably a rubricator's error. Enlarged letters in this manuscript usually mark the beginning of commentary text.
two words with two accents προς αιτης

div.ab:
om
Untranscribed commentary text
